name: cli-demo-generator
description: Generates professional animated CLI demos as GIFs using VHS terminal recordings. Handles tape file creation, self-bootstrapping demos with hidden setup, output noise filtering, post-processing speed-up, and frame-level verification. Use when users want to create terminal demos, record CLI workflows as GIFs, generate animated documentation, build demo tapes for README files, or need to showcase any command-line tool visually. Also triggers on "record terminal", "VHS tape", "demo GIF", "animate my
author: daymade
